payload:
# PQ Private Transfer Protocol

## Project Overview
Implement a post-quantum anonymous transfer protocol on Ethereum using Scaffold-ETH (Hardhat + NextJS).
The protocol uses Ring Regev (RLWE) homomorphic encryption for confidential balances and client-side STARKs for zero-knowledge proofs.
Transfers achieve recipient anonymity via ORAM-inspired dummy recipients (N=4: 1 real + 3 dummies).

Read more about the protocol design and cryptographic primitives in `docs/Protocol_Design.md`.

## Tech Stac... [truncated, 9361 chars total]

task_id: task-1773209575-71b7, task_key: pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements — Q1: Should STARK circuits prove full Ring Regev polynomial arithmetic (real ZK over NTT ops in Z_q), or is an abstracted/simplified representation acceptable for the prototype?

Q1 answered: use mock/stub STARK prover for prototype. Full NTT-based STARK circuits for n=1024 Ring Regev are infeasible in browser (hundreds of thousands of constraints, minutes to prove vs target <5s). No JS/WASM STARK library has RLWE gadgets. Ring Regev HE implemented for real; only ZK proof generation/verification stubbed with a deterministic hash commitment. Interface identical to real prover for drop-in replacement.

Q2: When fewer than 3 other registered users exist, what happens to a transfer? Block it / allow sender as dummy / allow duplicate dummies? task_id=task-1773209575-71b7 task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements

Q2 answered: Block transfers when pool < 5 total registered users. All 4 recipients must be distinct, registered, != sender. Contract stores totalRegistered; reverts InsufficientPool. UI shows pool-too-small error. Sender-as-dummy and duplicate dummies rejected. task_id=task-1773209575-71b7 task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements

Q3: Is a top-up deposit function needed? register() is one-time-only per the Protocol Design (checks pk == 0). Should there be a deposit() that HE.adds a new encrypted amount to existing balance, or are top-ups out of scope for this prototype? task_id=task-1773209575-71b7 task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements

Q3: Top-up deposits are IN SCOPE. Add deposit() function that reuses Deposit Circuit and does HE.add(existingBalance, encAmount) on-chain. task_id=task-1773209575-71b7 task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements

PQ Private Transfer requirements complete. 3 Q&A rounds: (1) mock STARK prover for prototype, real HE implemented; (2) block transfer when pool<5, contract validates 4 distinct registered recipients ≠ sender; (3) deposit() top-up in scope, reuses Deposit Circuit + HE.add. task_id=task-1773209575-71b7 task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements

PQ Private Transfer design complete. requirements.md + design.md written. Key: mock STARK prover, RingRegev.sol coefficient-wise add/sub, 3 separate verifiers, pool≥5 enforcement, deposit() top-up with HE.add, CEI+nonReentrant on withdraw.

REJECT — 2 FAILs: (1) NTT claimed with q=2²⁷ (power of 2, not prime — NTT requires prime q≡1 mod 2n, infeasible as written; use schoolbook O(n²) or change q); (2) No double-spend prevention — test scenario 5 cannot pass, no nullifier/spent-encTotal map in contract (either add keccak256(encTotal) nullifier or document deferred to real ZK + remove test). CONCERNs: (3) deposit() DepositVerifier needs pk from on-chain storage — not stated explicitly; (4) InsufficientContractBalance check missing from withdraw() CEI spec; (5) serialization bridge TypeScript bigint[]↔Solidity uint32[1024] not specified (byte order, packing). task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Q4 (post-rejection): Double-spend prevention — add keccak256(encTotal) nullifier map now (Option A, ~20k gas/tx, test scenario 5 stays) or defer to real ZK and remove test scenario 5 from current scope (Option B, simpler contract)? task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Q4: Option A — add keccak256(encTotal) nullifier map now. Mock prover makes it more necessary (no ZK replay protection). mapping(bytes32=>bool) usedTransfers + TransferAlreadyUsed() error. Test scenario 5 stays. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Q4 answered: double-spend prevention via keccak256(encTotal) nullifier map (Option A). Add usedTransfers mapping + TransferAlreadyUsed() error to contract. Test scenario 5 stays in scope. task_id=task-1773209661-7f1b task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements-answering

Post-rejection requirements resolved: Q4=add keccak256(encTotal) nullifier map (usedTransfers mapping + TransferAlreadyUsed error, test scenario 5 stays in scope). FAIL1 NTT infeasible with q=2^27 — architect to use schoolbook multiplication, no q change needed. Concerns 3/4/5 are architect-level clarifications. task_id=task-1773209661-7f1b task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:requirements-answering

pq-private-transfer design revised: fixed FAIL1 (schoolbook poly mul, q=2^27 not NTT-compatible), FAIL2 (usedTransfers nullifier map + TransferAlreadyUsed error), CONCERN3 (deposit reads pk from storage), CONCERN4 (InsufficientContractBalance in withdraw CEI), CONCERN5 (serialization spec: 4-byte LE per coeff). R12-R14 added to requirements. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

FAIL1: R13+design.md claim abi.decode(data,(uint32[1024])) for raw 4-byte LE bytes — abi.decode expects ABI-encoded data (32 bytes/uint32=32KB), not 4KB raw pack; Solidity library will be broken. FAIL2: requirements.md R1 still says NTT-based poly mul — contradicts design.md schoolbook fix; must update R1 to schoolbook. CONCERN3: transfer() CEI balance update order only in Mermaid, not in 4.4 steps. CONCERN4: overdraft/underflow test scenarios are mock-limited (client-side only, not contract-enforced). task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Q5: For overdraft and withdrawal underflow constraints — should the contract add non-ZK on-chain guards during the mock-prover phase (e.g., a parallel plaintext balance tracker), or should test scenarios 3 and 6 be re-labeled as client-side-only enforcement with an explicit mock-prover limitation note? task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

A5: Re-label test scenarios 3+6 as client-side-only (Option B). A parallel plaintext tracker breaks the protocol privacy model — contract would know real amounts, defeating HE. No viable non-ZK guard exists for encrypted balances. ZK circuits are the correct production enforcement boundary. Design.md needs: re-label scenarios 3+6 with mock-prover limitation callouts + add Mock-Prover Limitations section. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

A5 answered: re-label test scenarios 3+6 as client-side-only with mock-prover limitation notes. Architect must fix design.md: (1) abi.decode→manual loop for raw 4-byte LE serialization, (2) remove NTT from requirements.md R1, (3) clarify transfer() CEI balance update order in prose, (4) re-label scenarios 3+6 with mock-prover limitation callouts + add Mock-Prover Limitations section. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Revision 3: fixed abi.decode→manual loop (FAIL1), removed NTT from R1 (FAIL2), explicit transfer CEI balance order (CONCERN3), re-labeled scenarios 3+6 with mock-prover limitation callouts + new section 8a (CONCERN4). task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Revision 3 rejected. FAIL 1: requirements.md R13 has uint32(data[i*4]) — Solidity cant cast bytes1 to uint32, must use uint32(uint8(data[i*4])); design.md is correct but R13 is not. FAIL 2: totalDeposits decremented in withdraw() CEI but never incremented in register()/deposit() — Solidity 0.8 checked arithmetic will revert on underflow, breaking all withdrawals. CONCERN 3: noise budget warning in Appendix C.6 has no frontend implementation spec. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

Three fixes needed for Architect: (1) R13 cast: uint32(data[i*4]) → uint32(uint8(data[i*4])) in requirements.md; (2) totalDeposits never incremented — add totalDeposits += msg.value to register() and deposit() CEI in design.md; (3) Appendix C.6 noise budget warning — either remove or add frontend spec stub. All fixes are unambiguous. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

revision 4: fixed R13 bytes1→uint8→uint32 cast in requirements.md, added totalDeposits += msg.value to register() and deposit() CEI in design.md, removed unimplemented noise budget warn from Appendix C.6. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

revision 4 approved after 4 review cycles. All FAILs resolved: R13 bytes1 cast fixed, totalDeposits incremented in register/deposit, NTT removed from R1, abi.decode replaced with manual loop. Two minor prose concerns noted but not implementation blockers. task_id=task-1773210644-0d4a task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:design-review

codebase explored: Hardhat Ignition (not hardhat-deploy), no packages/crypto yet, Mocha+Chai tests, gas-reporter missing, ignition module path needs update; context.md written; task_id=task-1773216699-086d task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:research

9-step TDD plan written: crypto package (types/ringRegev/circuits), Solidity contracts (RingRegev/verifiers/PrivateTransfer), ignition deploy, frontend pages; task_id=task-1773217043-712b task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:planning
task_id=task-1773217230-877f task_key=step-1-crypto-types files=packages/crypto/{package.json,tsconfig.json,src/types.ts,src/index.ts,src/types.test.ts} tests=5/5-pass typecheck=clean
task_id=task-1773217230-877f task_key=step-1-crypto-types: all 5 types correct (Polynomial/Ciphertext/PublicKey/SecretKey/ZKProof), 5/5 tests pass, typecheck clean, package.json and tsconfig valid

task_id=task-1773217230-a1a8 task_key=step-2-ring-regev files=packages/crypto/src/ringRegev.ts,packages/crypto/src/index.ts tests=16/16 pass typecheck=clean summary: Implemented keygen/encrypt/decrypt/add/sub/homomorphicSum/serialize with DELTA=8192 scaling for noise tolerance
task_id=task-1773217230-bc48 task=Step3-MockSTARKCircuits files=packages/crypto/src/stark/{depositCircuit,transferCircuit,withdrawCircuit}.{ts,test.ts}+index.ts tests=26/26-pass typecheck=clean

task_id=task-1773217230-bc48 task_key= file=packages/crypto/src/stark/ reason=FAIL: npm test only runs 10/26 tests. Shell glob src/**/*.test.ts does not expand to src/*.test.ts without globstar — ringRegev.test.ts and types.test.ts are silently skipped. Fix: change package.json test script to use 'src/*.test.ts src/**/*.test.ts'. All 26 tests pass with the corrected glob.
task_id=task-1773217230-bc48 fix=changed test glob from 'src/**/*.test.ts' to 'src/*.test.ts src/**/*.test.ts' so root-level test files are included. All 26 tests pass (was 10).

task_id=task-1773217230-bc48, task_key=none, task_file=none. All 26 tests pass. TypeScript clean. Adversarial scenarios (tampered inputs, mismatched pk) correctly rejected. Mock STARK circuits implement SHA-256 commitment pattern correctly across all 3 circuits. Minor: transfer circuit test missing tampered-inputs case (covered by manual verification), but not a blocker.

task-1773217230-bc48 (Step 3: Mock STARK Circuits) review.passed and closed. 26 tests pass, SHA-256 commitment pattern correct across all 3 circuits (deposit/transfer/withdraw). 6 implementation tasks remain open: Steps 4-9 (RingRegev.sol, Verifier contracts, PrivateTransfer.sol, 3 frontend pages).
task_id: task-1773217230-d3bc, task_key: pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-04:ringregev-sol, code_task: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/tasks/task-04-ringregev-sol.code-task.md

task_id: task-1773217230-d3bc, task_key: pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-04:ringregev-sol, files: packages/hardhat/contracts/RingRegev.sol, packages/hardhat/contracts/test/RingRegevHarness.sol, packages/hardhat/test/RingRegev.test.ts, tests: 6/6 pass (npx hardhat test test/RingRegev.test.ts)

task_id: task-1773217230-d3bc, task_key: pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-04:ringregev-sol, files: packages/hardhat/contracts/RingRegev.sol, packages/hardhat/contracts/test/RingRegevHarness.sol, packages/hardhat/test/RingRegev.test.ts — all 6 tests pass, LE serialization correct, modular arithmetic correct, length validation with custom error, no concrete bugs

task-1773217230-d3bc (Step 4: RingRegev.sol) closed — 6 tests pass, LE serialization correct, modular arithmetic correct, custom error on bad length. Next: Step 5 (Verifier Contracts + Tests, task-1773217230-ec9d).

task_id: task-1773217230-ec9d, task_key: pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-05:verifier-contracts, code_task: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/tasks/task-05-verifier-contracts.code-task.md

task_id=task-1773217230-ec9d task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-05:verifier-contracts file=.agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/tasks/task-05-verifier-contracts.code-task.md summary='3 verifier contracts + 9 tests, all passing'

task_id=task-1773217230-ec9d task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-05:verifier-contracts file=.agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/tasks/task-05-verifier-contracts.code-task.md all 9 tests pass, contracts correct and minimal

task_id=task-1773217230-ec9d task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-05:verifier-contracts completed: DepositVerifier.sol, TransferVerifier.sol, WithdrawVerifier.sol with 9 passing tests. Next: Step 6 (PrivateTransfer.sol + Deploy)

task_id=task-1773217230-0447 task_key=pdd:pq-private-transfer:step-06:private-transfer-sol backing=.agents/scratchpad/implementation/pq-private-transfer/tasks/task-06-private-transfer-sol.code-task.md

Step 6: PrivateTransfer.sol + Deploy (task-1773217230-0447) — implement PrivateTransfer.sol with register/transfer/withdraw functions using RingRegev lib and verifier contracts, create ignition module, write comprehensive tests
